Bus Timings

360 Bus Schedule  Ali Hader Al Mazrouei Mosque to Al Ain Central Bus Station

October 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s extensive public transport network is designed to connect various parts of the city and beyond, and Reg Bus 360 is a prime example of that. This route links Ali Hader Al Mazrouei Mosque to Al Ain Central Bus Station, passing through key residential, commercial, and community hubs. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting educational institutions, or exploring Al Ain, Bus 360 provides a reliable and affordable way to travel through Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscape.

Operational Details

Bus 360 operates frequently throughout the day, offering regular services in both directions.

From Ali Hader Al Mazrouei Mosque From Al Ain Central
08:00 06:00
12:00 10:00
16:00 14:00
20:00 18:00
00:00 22:00

Bus 360 Timetable

For the complete schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to access Bus 360 timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare for the bus is AED 2.00 plus AED 0.05 per kilometer, with payments conveniently made using the Hafilat Smart Card. This card can be easily topped up at kiosks or online, offering a hassle-free, cashless option for frequent travelers.

Route Overview

The 360 Bus starts at Ali Hader Al Mazrouei Mosque and ends at Al Ain Central Bus Station, stopping at important community facilities, schools, and markets along the way. Below are some key stops along the route:

  1. Ali Hader Al Mazrouei Mosque The starting point of the route.

  2. Souq A vibrant marketplace.

  3. Atfal Hilal Kindergarten Serving the local education community.

  4. Sultan Bin Zaied Mosque A prominent place of worship.

  5. Nahil Park A recreational park for the community.

  6. Nahil Petrol Station A convenient stop for fuel and amenities.

  7. Nahil Girls School A local educational institution.

  8. Salem Obaid Al Ameri Mosque A peaceful mosque stop.

  9. Gate 10, Exit 35, Exit 30, and Gate 5 Access points along the route connecting to rural areas.

  10. Farm and Wadi Al Hamam Scenic countryside stops.

  11. Fodder Factory An industrial stop along the route.

  12. Khalfan Sultan Al Ketbi Mosque Another significant mosque on the way.

  13. Al Ain School A stop serving local students.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Rahma Medical Center / Al Qattara Oasis East A healthcare facility and cultural destination.

  2. Al Kharais / Al Ain Gift Markets A bustling marketplace area.

  3. Al Jahili Park A serene park near Al Ain’s historic district.

  4. Department of Public Health A key stop for accessing public services.

  5. Al Ain Bus Station The final stop, offering connections to other routes and services.

This route offers a comprehensive look at both rural and urban communities while providing convenient access to essential facilities.

Accessibility Features

This ensures a smooth and comfortable journey for all passengers.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Whether you’re traveling further within Al Ain or heading to other parts of the UAE, these transfer points make planning your journey easier.

Nearby Attractions

  • Al Jahili Park

  • Al Rahma Medical Center
  • Souq
  • Al Ain Gift Markets

Journey Experience

As the journey progresses, passengers can observe the transition from serene countryside to the vibrant, historic heart of Al Ain.

Travel Tips

  1. Check the schedule in advance to avoid long waits.

  2. Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates on bus timings.

  3. Consider traveling during off-peak hours for a more relaxed trip.

Reg Bus 360 provides a convenient and affordable way to explore Al Ain and its surrounding areas. Whether you’re commuting for work, visiting key landmarks, or running errands, Bus 360 offers a smooth, efficient, and scenic travel experience across Abu Dhabi’s diverse landscape. For real-time updates and additional route details, visit the AD Mobility website. You can also find a complete overview of the city’s bus routes right here.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 13, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
